ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade level of the student */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the student is enrolled in */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "parent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the student's parent */,
  "parent_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student's parent */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_grade FOREIGN KEY ("grade") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher assigned to the class */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school where the class is located */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "class_room" TEXT /* Room number of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the teacher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the teacher */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject taught by the teacher */,
  "teacher_description" TEXT /* Description of the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the school */,
  "school_description" TEXT /* Description of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "form" TEXT /* Form or version of the assessment */,
  "total_questions" INTEGER /* Total number of questions in the assessment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date the assessment was conducted */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the assessment was conducted for */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., quiz, test, exam) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the assessment in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment */,
  "raw_score" INTEGER /* Raw score obtained by the student */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage score obtained by the student */,
  "sheet" INTEGER /* Sheet number of the assessment */,
  "serial" INTEGER /* Serial number of the assessment */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_results_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_results_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incorrect_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incorrect question */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment result */,
  "question_number" INTEGER /* Number of the question answered incorrectly */,
  "incorrect_answer" TEXT /* Incorrect answer provided by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incorrect_questions_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES assessment_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_forms" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment */,
  "form_name" TEXT /* Name of the form */,
  "total_questions" INTEGER /* Total number of questions in the form */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the form */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the form was created */,
  "form_description" TEXT /* Description of the form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_forms_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the form */,
  "question_number" INTEGER /* Number of the question within the form */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "answer_choices" TEXT /* Answer choices for the question */,
  "correct_answer" TEXT /* Correct answer to the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_questions_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES assessment_forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES assessment_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade level */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade level */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the grade level */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the grade level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)
